name: Green Tomato Omelet with Basil
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Green tomatoes, sliced ½-inch thick
Light olive oil; for the pan (or Butter)
2 tbsp Fresh basil leaves or lovage leaves, torn or finely sliced
Sprigs of basil or lovage for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the tomatoes in cornmeal or flour.
2. Heat enough oil in a 10-inch non-stick pan to cover the surface (or use butter).
3. Fry the tomatoes briefly on each side until lightly colored; do not let them become soft.
4. While frying the tomatoes, lightly beat the eggs with scallions and basil leaves. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Pour the beaten eggs over the tomatoes.
6. Let the eggs sit for about a minute, then give the pan a gentle shake to loosen the bottom.
7. Cook over medium-low heat until the eggs are nicely colored on the bottom.
8. Slide the omelet onto a large plate using a spatula.
9. Place the pan back over the plate, invert it, and return to the heat briefly to cook the other side.
10. When done, turn the omelet out onto a serving plate and garnish with fresh sprigs of the herb used. Slice and serve.
